metadata.title: MonoCool - Air Conditioners Without Outdoor Unit | Europe
metadata.description: MonoCool offers innovative air conditioners without outdoor units for Europe. Efficient cooling and heating without complicated installation.

hero.title: Air Conditioners Without Outdoor Unit
hero.subtitle: Revolutionary monoblock climate technology from Italy. Easy installation, maximum comfort, minimal effort.

features.title: Why MonoCool?
features.subtitle: Discover the advantages of our innovative climate technology

noOutdoor.title: No Outdoor Unit
noOutdoor.description: No disruptive outdoor unit on the facade. Perfect for heritage buildings and rental apartments.

quiet.title: Whisper Quiet
quiet.description: At only 19 dB(A), our devices are among the quietest on the market.

easy.title: Easy Installation
easy.description: Only a small core drilling required. Installation possible within hours.

efficient.title: Energy Efficient
efficient.description: Up to A+++ energy efficiency class for minimal operating costs.

products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: Find the perfect air conditioner for your space

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Have questions? We are happy to help!

footer.description: MonoCool - Innovative air conditioners without outdoor unit. Perfect climate control for your home or office.

imprint.disputeText: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR). We are neither willing nor obliged to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: The protection of your personal data is of particular concern to us. We therefore process your data exclusively on the basis of legal provisions (GDPR).
privacy.responsibleText: The party responsible for data processing on this website is MonoCool GmbH.
privacy.dataCollectionText: When you visit our website, technical information is automatically collected: IP address, browser type, operating system, access time. This data is used exclusively to ensure smooth operation of the website.
privacy.cookiesText: Our website uses cookies. These are small text files stored on your device. Some cookies are technically necessary, others help us improve our website.
privacy.rightsText: You generally have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction, data portability, revocation and objection. If you believe that the processing of your data violates data protection law, you can lodge a complaint with the supervisory authority.
privacy.contactText: For questions about data protection, you can contact us at any time. Contact details will be added before launch.
privacy.updatesText: We reserve the right to adapt this privacy policy to comply with changed legal requirements or when our services change.

meta.title: Fan Coil Design - Ventilconvectors | MonoCool
meta.description: Discover our designer fan coil units. Elegant ventilconvectors for modern heating and cooling.

hero.title: Fan Coil Ventilconvectors
hero.description: Elegant climate control for discerning spaces. Our designer fan coils combine highest efficiency with timeless aesthetics.

products.title: Our Fan Coil Models
products.subtitle: Choose from five different designs for every application

fs.name: FS - Floor Standing
fs.description: The FS model is an elegant floor-standing unit that blends seamlessly into any interior. Ideal for living rooms, offices, and reception areas.

sm.name: SM - Surface Mount
sm.description: The SM model is the perfect solution for tight spaces. The flat design enables discrete wall mounting.
sm.feature2: Easy wall mounting without floor installation

hw.name: HW - Horizontal Wall
hw.description: The horizontal HW model offers maximum heating and cooling capacity for large rooms. Ideal under windows or on parapets.
hw.feature3: Even air distribution throughout the room

bt.name: BT - Bench Type
bt.description: The BT model integrates climate control into an elegant bench seat. Perfect for reception areas, waiting zones, and modern architecture.

tw.name: TW - Tower
tw.description: The TW Tower model is a slim standing column for corners and narrow areas. Minimal footprint with maximum efficiency.
tw.feature1: Slim column shape saves floor space

features.title: Why Our Fan Coils?
features.subtitle: Innovative technology for the highest demands

design.title: Award-Winning Design
design.description: Our fan coils were developed by renowned designers and blend harmoniously into any environment.

efficiency.title: Highest Efficiency
efficiency.description: Latest generation EC motors ensure minimal power consumption with maximum performance.

quiet.title: Whisper-Quiet Operation
quiet.description: Optimized fan geometry and sound insulation for operation from just 20 dB(A).

eco.title: Eco-Friendly
eco.description: Compatible with renewable energy sources such as heat pumps and solar systems.

control.title: Smart Control
control.description: WiFi control and integration into smart home systems for maximum comfort.

quality.title: Made in Italy
quality.description: Highest manufacturing quality from Italian production with 5 years warranty.

cta.title: Ready for Elegant Climate Control?
cta.description: Contact us for personal consultation or request our current catalog.
